title: cyperus diffusus var. brevibracteatus
intro: Cyperus diffusus var. brevibracteatus, also known as the small flower umbrella sedge, is a type of plant species that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant is traditionally used in medicine, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cyperus diffusus var. brevibracteatus include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, and can also be dried and used in capsule or powder form to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
